dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes methodological consistency over specific trend characteristics. Entry requires: (1) price above 50-MA, (2) 50-MA aligned with trade direction (tested via comparison to prev_close), (3) price breaks/closes above 10-MA. Exit occurs when price closes below 50-MA. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since the same mechanical method applies to both long and short entries based on MA alignment. The 'consistency_requirement' parameter is a meta-rule for execution and does not translate to specific indicator conditions.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter trades consistently using a defined trend-identification method, prioritizing methodological consistency over the specific characteristics of the trend definition itself.
